events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate described field condition. Scenario: work around Motor circuits & disconnects photographed from one angle only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since critical evidence missing, cannot verify compliance. Therefore decision needs_more_info. Risk? Could be medium because motor disconnects missing verification could be safety issue. But no visible defect. Need observations. Need fill fields. Let's craft JSON.
